title: Range XOR Queries with Subarray Reversals
titleCn: 范围异或查询与子数组反转

detail.title: Range XOR Queries with Subarray Reversals
hints: Augment each AVL tree node with fields for subtree XOR, size, and a lazy reversal flag to efficiently update and query segments.
Use split and merge operations on the AVL tree to isolate subarrays for point updates, range XOR queries, and reversals in O(log n) time.
